div.head: Chargé Hitt to the Secretary of State.
div.p: (Referring to department’s telegram of November 5, Mr. Hitt states that the foreign office informs him that this Government will accept so-called white certificates and withdraws requirement for certificate attesting microscopic inspection of pork products, and that this decision has been telegraphed to Italian ambassador at Washington with instructions to advise all Italian consular officers in the United States accordingly.)
